_note: DutchwithJoost product palette (from the app + landing-page shadcn theme). Canonical color tokens for the Instagram GRAPHIC/TYPOGRAPHIC layer (headlines, chips, progress dots, CTA buttons, subtitle accents). Illustrations stay in the watercolor Style Block in brand-kit.md — do not recolor Joost or scenes to these values.

primary.role: hero NL phrases, wordmark, headlines, links

secondary.role: accents: when-pills, active dots, CTA buttons, underlines

usage_rules: Gold (#E0BB00) has low contrast on white. Use it as a FILL with dark text (#18181B) on top, never as small text on a light background.
Blue (#0025DB) is the brand anchor: hero Dutch phrases, wordmark, headlines.
Keep illustrations watercolor (Style Block). These tokens are for text/graphics only.
